description.en: Classification, origin, VAT and excise scenarios for movements from England and the United Kingdom to Turkey — Hanbros UK customs consultancy.

keyword.en: HS classification advisory, origin proof UK Turkey, pre-declaration customs review

text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Regulatory changes may require amended declarations. We align your statements with broker review.
